testimonials.text:
I've reached out for multiple different services and my readings are always on point. I see almost immediate results after getting any type of candle or spell work done and Carmen makes it easy to understand and really gives great guidance in a safe, non judgmental space. My go to always!
Thank you!
testimonials.name: Rebeca
Daisy
testimonials.text:
I had such an amazing tarot reading experience ✨ The energy felt so genuine from the start. Everything that came up was incredibly accurate and really resonated with what I’d been going through. After my reading I felt so much clarity, and more grounded.

You can tell the real intuition and care behind the reading. I’d definitely recommend this to anyone looking for guidance, clarity, or just a deeper connection with themselves 🧿

testimonials.name: George
testimonials.text:
She’s always come through every time I’m in need of a little bit of guidance. She definitely goes into detail about everything that she reads and pretty much tells you straight up what you need to hear whether you like it or not.
Definitely hit her up if you’re looking to dive deeper into whatever situation you need in or to make things move along!!
